detail.goal: Untrusted content cannot forge or close the fence: every occurrence of the sentinel in content is neutralized before wrapping, so wrapped text can never escape the untrusted-data fence or inject control tokens.

detail.result: The developer's tests are sound, non-vacuous, and directly exercise the security goal of neutralizing embedded…
